message:
feat: connector state resume extensions, mesh planner/coordinator updates, SDK and E2E improvements

fcp-core/connector_state.rs: Resume boundary extensions and additional
migratable computation types.

fcp-kernel/lib.rs: Re-export adjustments.
fcp-mesh: Coordinator and planner refinements, node updates.
fcp-e2e: Evidence and host E2E test improvements.
fcp-sdk: Module updates, sigv4 cleanup.
CBOR test vectors refreshed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
